'''Bresnan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Wellte-ir system/Legends|Wellte-ir system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]].

==History==
{{Quote|In a hundred years, they won't remember me for the Treaty at Bresnan or how I saved Starbright Station.|Ki Sazen|<ref name="SWTORRescue">{{TORcite|type=class|Imperial Agent|The Chronicles|Taris}}</ref>}}
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ki Sazen]] participated in the signing of the [[Treaty at Bresnan]].<ref name="SWTORRescue" />

Millennia later, Bresnan was the location of the [[Wellte-ir Massacre]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], prior the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Fifteen of twenty-one members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Scandium Team]] were lost on the plains of Bresnan, including [[Nyik]], and [[Tor'ara]]; [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Dutra Zeneta]], [[Korgath]], [[Rith Tar'ak]], [[Opit-Wenbruh]], [[Aven Cholus]], and [[Harovan Toth]] were the six surviving [[Rebel Alliance Special Forces|Special Forces]] [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltrators]].<ref name="CRO" />
